overlap_domain: Regional PH908 branch architecture and receiver-side I2a/R1a contrast
claim_separation_boundary: The present analysis tests specified source-receiver model compatibility in public Y-tree data and does not duplicate regional branch-architecture or reservoir claims as its main result.
